item.title: Managing Multiple Pythons
item.description: Why I believe that many people may encounter the following problem: their computer has Python3.x installed, but suddenly they need to use Python2.x. How can they make both versions coexist without interfering with each other? If you search on Baidu, most of the answers recommend renaming the python.exe file. I personally do not recommend this approach. Although it may seem like a quick solution, it has the potential to negatively impact other functionalities on the computer.
item.content:encoded:
Why

I believe that many people may encounter the following problem: their computer has Python3.x installed, but suddenly they need to use Python2.x. How can they make both versions coexist without interfering with each other? If you search on Baidu, most of the answers recommend renaming the python.exe file.

I personally do not recommend this approach. Although it may seem like a quick solution, it has the potential to negatively impact other functionalities on the computer. Furthermore, this method is not elegant and can actually damage the program. If this were a valid solution, it would have been officially released by the Python organization.

So, what should you do instead? Let’s discuss today.

From the installation process

I wonder if you’ve noticed the two options during the initial installation of Python:

  • Install launcher for all users (recommended)
  • Add Python to PATH

If you were paying attention, you might have noticed that the first option is pre-selected by default, and it is even recommended in parentheses. However, ‘Add Python to PATH’ does not receive the same treatment. What does this design choice by the official team imply? To answer this question, we must first talk about the PATH variable.

About PATH

In Windows systems, PATH is a special environment variable that is a string containing multiple paths separated by semicolons. When you type the name of an executable file in the command prompt, Windows searches for the file in these paths to locate its location, allowing you to run the file from anywhere. Therefore, it is necessary to add Python to PATH during installation to enable the operating system to run Python.

The issue is that we cannot simply install one version of Python, and sometimes we encounter the problem mentioned earlier. So, what can we do about it? In fact, the official team provided a solution a long time ago, which is the default option during installation. For more details, you can refer to this link.

Python launcher

The Python launcher, also known as py.exe, is installed by default in the C:\Windows\ directory if the first option is selected during installation. It allows us to choose and switch between multiple versions of Python. Using the launcher, we can run Python scripts with a specific version of Python without having to worry about the system’s default Python version (i.e., the one added to PATH). Additionally, the launcher can automatically detect the shebang line in a Python script, such as #!/usr/bin/env python, and select the correct Python version to run it.

Entering py --list in the command line will display the Python versions that are installed on the system:

PS C:\Users\leehyon> py --list
Installed Pythons found by C:\Windows\py.exe Launcher for Windows
 -3.9-64 *
 -3.9-32
 -2.7-64

Assuming you have written a script called script.py that you want to run under Python 3.9, you can use the following command:

py -3.9 script.py

Or if you want to run the script using Python 2.7 instead, you can use the following command:

py -2 script.py

Of course, if you find the above commands too cumbersome, you can simplify the process by adding an explanation in the shebang line of the script.py code. For example, adding #! python2 at the beginning of the script will allow you to run the script using Python 2 by simply typing script.py in the command prompt.

py script.py

However, note that the shebang line may not be recognized on Windows systems, so it’s generally safer to use the py launcher to specify the version of Python to use.

Last

We’ll stop here for today. To learn more about specific usage, I suggest exploring the official documentation on your own.

In addition, it’s recommended to familiarize yourself with environment variables, such as system and user environment variables, and their priorities. This knowledge can help you solve many problems in development and debugging.

item.title: Is Infono Short-term Hype or Fundamentals-driven
item.content:encoded:
Foreword

❗ This content does not constitute any investment advice and is only a personal opinion. Investment carries risks, and trading should be cautious!

“When we talk about an industry, what exactly are we talking about? And when we want to speculate on it, what should we focus on?”

Actually, when I first heard about the concept of “Infono”, I was also confused. But when I saw those stocks that had continuous daily limit ups, I thought maybe I could make some profits if I had a better understanding of this concept. Of course, the market is constantly changing, and the recent sector rotation is also unpredictable. As a small retail investor like me, the probability of being cut off like a leek is high. However, if there is a strategy that balances my limited energy and risk tolerance, it should be the most practical.

Learning how to quickly understand an industry under policy guidance and think about its underlying logic and fundamentals is indeed a lesson I need to learn. I originally intended to write some investment insights based on the “infono” as a starting point, but due to my shallow understanding, I will put it on hold for now. I will revisit this topic when I have a better grasp of it.

What is Infono

“Infono” refers to the innovation industry of information technology application, which aims to achieve autonomous and controllable information technology and ensure national information security. Its core lies in the construction of a domestically-produced information technology software and hardware underlying architecture system and a full-cycle ecological system through industry application promotion, solving the “bottleneck” problem of core technology key links. The “Infono” industry is the foundation of the digital economy and the development of information security, and is also an important content of “new infrastructure”. It will become one of the important means to promote China’s economic growth.

Before discussing “Infono”, let’s first talk about the big picture.

“Infono” is not actually a new concept, but has recently sparked market discussions with policy catalysis. The importance of “Infono” is self-evident. As early as 2016, the country mentioned the security and controllability of the information industry. Since then, the concept of “Infono” has gradually expanded to the entire industrialization process from bottom-layer chips to upper-layer applications.

The narrow definition of “Infono” refers to the things that support the needs of party and government offices, such as office software and databases, which are the “2” in the “2+8+N” system proposed by the government. Currently, this node of “Infono” has developed into a broader concept, involving “8+N”, including finance, telecommunications, electricity and transportation, and other industries. It not only refers to the general software and hardware that support office work but also involves many aspects such as the localization of core components.

The concept of “Infono” fermented from 2019 to 2020, completing the process from 0 to 1. Looking forward from the current node, “Infono” should have a larger expectation both in terms of time and space.
